steps.title: Multiply both sides by w
steps.content:
To eliminate the denominator, multiply both sides of the equation by $w$:
$$\frac{-54}{w} \cdot w = 6 \cdot w$$
$$-54 = 6w$$

steps.title: Divide both sides by 6
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 6 to isolate $w$:
$$\frac{6w}{6} = \frac{-54}{6}$$
$$w = -9$$
